name_en: For the color dilemma 👀 MIUMIU Vivant
name_cn:
For the color dilemma 👀 MIUMIU Vivant
🔥 Comparison of two popular colorways:
Caramel Suede or Cognac Calfskin
A retro bowling bag that goes with everything 〰️ Soft and comfortable to carry, worry-free for daily use. The retro leather texture is top-notch, and the look is maxed out 🔝
Easy to style with any outfit, the vibe is perfectly captured.
